PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Byron Sun for Dennis Sullivan.

The Court noted that the will was executed in Austria, that it is in German, and that they have a declaration from two witnesses with the issue being the signature looks nothing like the signatures on the will. Mr. Sun stated that he filed a proof of subscribing witness of Dr. Peter Konradt (the first signature) and proof of subscribing witness of Renate Jauk (she is the third one), and that he is not aware of anybody objecting here or anywhere else. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (order signed in open Court). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for July 9, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
